title: Señorita
why_this_song: Señorita by Shawn Mendes (2019) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Ooh, you keep me coming for ya"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I love it when you call me señorita"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "It's true, la-la-la"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Ooh, I should be runnin'"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Ooh, I should be runnin'"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "coming" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "coming" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "call" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "call" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Ooh, love, your kiss is deadly, don't stop

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Señorita" was released in 2019. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Señorita" foi lançada em 2019. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Señorita" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Señorita" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
